diagrams.title: Function Overloading Resolution Flowchart
diagrams.description: Shows how compiler decides which overloaded function to call based on argument types
elements: If exactly one match → call that function

diagrams.title: Function Signature Components
diagrams.description: Visual representation of what constitutes function signature vs what doesn't
elements: Signature (IN): Parameter count, Parameter types, Parameter order
NOT in signature: Return type, Default values, noexcept specifier
diagrams.purpose: Clarifying common misconception about function overloading
